name: @intentsolutionsio/market-price-tracker
description: Real-time market price tracking with multi-exchange feeds and advanced alerts

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install market-price-tracker\\n  or /plugin install market-price-tracker@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
